items.source_note: IRDAI FY 2023-24
items.evidence_snippet: IRDAI URL is PDF landing (WebFetch can't read PDF). External aggregators report 96.33% as the 2019-20 IBAI figure for IFFCO Tokio, not FY 2023-24 (which they cite as 90.65%). Year mislabeled likely.

items.source_note: IRDAI 2023-24 (3-year avg through FY25)
items.evidence_snippet: IRDAI URL is a PDF landing. External sources confirm 91.62% is the 3-year average (2022-25), but our field is labelled 'claim_settlement_ratio_pct' with year '2023-24'. Year mislabel — value reasonable.

items.source_note: IRDAI 2023-24 (3-year avg)
items.evidence_snippet: IRDAI URL is PDF landing. External aggregators confirm 88.72% as Tata AIG 3-year avg 2022-25; single-year FY23-24 may differ. Year mislabel possible.

items.source_note: IRDAI 2023-24
items.evidence_snippet: IRDAI URL is PDF landing. External aggregator shows Bajaj General CSR 93.54% (close to 92.24%); exact 92.24% not surfaced in search.

items.source_note: IRDAI 2023-24
items.evidence_snippet: IRDAI URL is PDF landing. External sources cite 99.96% (IRDAI FY23-24) or 99% (rounded); our 99.0 is consistent but exact value not retrievable from cited URL.
